title: EarthLand: Season 14
description: The official modpack for EarthLand Season 14. It features planes, trains, and automobiles - and so much more!
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods designed for a private SMP, but still makes for a fun singleplayer adventure.

---
- Build elaborate contraptions with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its numerous addons! ⚙️🚂
- Become a culinary king with a plethora of food and drink mods, such as the [Let's Do](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-api) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) series! 🥘🍴
- Become the ultimate adventurer with [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)! 🗡️💎
- Conquer the arts of photography and painting with [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) and [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)! 📷🎨
- Put your pedal to the metal with [Automobility](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility)! 🏎️🚜
- Watch the years pass by with [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons)! 🍂❄️
- Hold your own (and look cool doing it) with [Timeless and Classics Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)! 💥🔫
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
As stated before, this modpack is designed to be played with many players. While it is fully enjoyable in singleplayer, there's lots of great qualities better with friends!
- Dance the night away with [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)! 🕺👋
- Blast your favorite tunes, or compose your own with [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies)! 🎹🎶
- Immerse yourself with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), and it's Walkie-Talkie/Radio addon!🎤📻
- Explore together, with [Kaffee's Dual Ride](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaffees_dual_ride)! 🐎🦋
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
Also contains the [Simple Create Radios](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-create-radios) resource pack for parity.
Designed to be used on the [Minecraft Earth Map](https://earth.motfe.net/).
